content: Phase 2: V1 Lab - all features built + tested 97.5% pass
Phase 3: Auto-Optimizer (Optuna + Grid + CMA-ES + walk-forward + heatmaps + robustness)
Phase 4: Upstox OAuth + WS tick stream + Live Signal Console + paper trading + audit trail
Phase 5: Probabilistic exit engine + meta-model + position sizing + event filter + VIX overlay + What-If + Telegram
Phase 6: Swing Extension - daily/weekly TF + overnight risk
Phase 7: Local Deployment Package - Docker Compose + scripts + LOCAL_SETUP_GUIDE.md
